# Name: # OTA dual-slot (rollback) + NVS + small SPIFFS for transcript log.
# 16MB flash total. Each OTA slot is 1.875MB. We only claim 256KB for
# SPIFFS even though there's 12MB unused above ota_1 - the bottleneck
# is MCU RAM (SPIFFS index cache scales with partition size
# actual log file). 256KB index + ~10KB RAM gives us ~44 min of rolling
# heartbeat history (translog.c rotates between two 100KB segments)
# which is enough for the failure modes /debug exists to catch.
# Reclaim the trailing space if a future feature genuinely needs flash.
